description: You are an Observability Engineer at a cloud provider. Pagers are going off randomly because the datacenter temperature sensors occasionally report 1-minute 500-degree spikes, and the disk IO metrics report null (instead of 0) when no writes occur, breaking downstream mathematical alerts. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Cleaned Telemetry' containing four graphs: 'Bridged Traffic Signal' using metric 'servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1' with the keepLastValue() function; 'Median-Smoothed Temperature' using metric 'servers.datacenter.machine_temperature' with the movingMedian() function (window size 5); 'Continuous Disk IO' using metric 'servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes' with the transformNull() function (value 0); and 'Clean Fleet CPU' using wildcard metric 'servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*' with the aliasByNode() function (index 1). Save the dashboard when complete.
